# Pigeon Defenders

Pigeon Defenders is a local Metro Vancouver bird-proofing company that installs balcony bird netting, pigeon spikes, balcony cleaning, pet and cat safety netting, and commercial bird control systems.

## Website

- Home: https://pigeondefenders.ca/
- Balcony bird netting: https://pigeondefenders.ca/balcony-bird-netting.html
- Pigeon spike installation: https://pigeondefenders.ca/pigeon-spike-installation.html
- Balcony cleaning: https://pigeondefenders.ca/balcony-cleaning.html
- Pet and cat safety netting: https://pigeondefenders.ca/pet-cat-netting.html
- Commercial bird control: https://pigeondefenders.ca/commercial-bird-control.html
- Service areas: https://pigeondefenders.ca/service-areas.html
- Contact and free quote: https://pigeondefenders.ca/contact.html

## Contact

- Phone or text: 236-999-5739
- Email: support@pigeondefenders.ca

## Service Areas

Pigeon Defenders serves Vancouver, Burnaby, Richmond, Surrey, Coquitlam, North Vancouver, West Vancouver, Delta, New Westminster, Langley, and nearby Metro Vancouver communities.

## Core Services

- Balcony bird netting for condos, apartments, and homes
- Pigeon spike installation for ledges, signs, rooflines, gutters, beams, and commercial buildings
- Balcony cleaning for pigeon droppings, nesting debris, and bird mess before proofing
- Pet and cat safety balcony netting
- Commercial bird control for strata buildings, storefronts, warehouses, signs, rooflines, and ledges

## Brand Message

Keep Birds Out. Keep Your Space Safe. Cleaner Spaces. Safer Places. Smart Solutions. Lasting Results.
